description: Hand-authored synthetic augmented IOI-style sentence completions with varied narrative formats.

documents.text: Jordan and Riley visited the post office after Jordan mailed the bright postcard to Riley
Mina saw Caleb waiting by the lockers, so Mina quietly passed the folded note to Caleb
Sofia and Mateo set the table before Sofia baked the chocolate cake for Mateo
Avery and Quinn studied the trail markers while Avery showed the folded map to Quinn
Nina and Theo watched the rain start, and Nina lent the blue umbrella to Theo
Harper noticed Lena standing in the aisle, then Harper offered the empty seat to Lena
Oscar and Maya walked past the market before Oscar bought the red scarf for Maya
Grace and Ethan practiced after school until Grace taught the new song to Ethan
